page_title: Termination law in Minnesota 2026 | At-will, exceptions, final pay
meta_description: Minnesota at-will employment 2026: Whistleblower Act, Human Rights Act, drug-testing rules, final pay due within 24 hours of demand on involuntary dismissal.
target_keywords: minnesota human rights act protected classes

flags.description: Minnesota cannabis off-duty dismissal rules (post-Aug 2023, Minn. Stat. § 181.950 subd. 5 as amended) are subject to ongoing regulatory development. Page does not hardcode specific rules; includes a disclaimer and redirects to specialist. Verify current state before any cannabis-related dismissal.
flags.action: Confirm with Minnesota employment counsel or DEED before any client relies on this section.

flags.description: Minneapolis and St Paul wage-theft ordinance penalty amounts are not hardcoded in the page — these update periodically. Page flags the existence of city-level penalties without citing specific dollar amounts.
flags.action: Add specific penalty amounts if current figures can be confirmed against city ordinance text.

flags.description: Task CRITICAL spec says CSS path is ../../_shared/child-base.css (2 levels). For a US-state child at united-states/<state>/<topic>/index.html, the structural depth is 3 levels. G2 badges use ../../../_shared/g2-badges/ (3 levels) per schema-spec. CSS path used as specified in task CRITICAL block.
flags.action: Verify in live deployment that ../../_shared/child-base.css resolves correctly from the united-states/<state>/<topic>/ depth.

flags.description: customer-strip section is wrapped inside a nested <div class='container'> that sits within the outer container div. In the UK reference page, customer-strip closes the outer container. Review in live CSS that the nested pattern does not cause padding/max-width drift.
flags.action: QA in preview; move customer-strip to close outer container if double-nesting causes layout issues.

flags.description: chip-nav only links to Overview and the current page (Termination). No other Minnesota state child pages exist yet. Nav will need expansion when sibling pages build out.
flags.action: Update chip-nav when additional Minnesota child pages are generated.
